notes: RUN33 v2: comprehensive uptrend short block filter. 18 coins, 366 days. $100/coin/day reset. RISK=10% LEVERAGE=5x FEE=0.1%/side SLIP=0.05%/side. 29 uptrend indicators tested: MA position (sma50/100/200), MA cross/slope, momentum (ret48/96), z50, RSI zone, bullish structure, and 9 combinations. Complement strategies INCLUDED. Scalp/Momentum EXCLUDED.
